stories.headline: Satellite images show scale of destruction in Venezuela earthquakes
stories.description: Satellite images show the before and after of parts of Venezuela left in ruins by two devastating quakes.

stories.headline: Iran video said to show missiles being launched in response to U.S. strikes
stories.description: Tehran launched drone and missile attacks targeting Bahrain and Kuwait in response to U.S. airstrike...

stories.headline: Eleven killed in civilian aircraft crash in north eastern France, authorities say
stories.description: The pilot and 10 passengers died in the incident, local officials said.

stories.description: The Democratic Party is confronting its long-standing dilemmas over identity and ideology as it wres...

stories.headline: Saudi Arabia helicopter crash kills all 14 on board
stories.description: The helicopter belonging to the Saudi Aramco oil company crashed in Ras Tanura, Saudi state media reported.
